title: Design System: Ray Fajar Salinggih Portfolio

display.purpose: Hero name only. Playfair Display at clamp(3rem, 8vw, 6rem).

headline.purpose: Section titles — About, Projects, Experience, Skills, Education.

title.purpose: Card titles, job positions, degree names.

body.purpose: Paragraphs and descriptions. Inter at 1.125rem, max 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Skill category headers. Uppercase, tracked. One per section max.

shadows.name: soft
shadows.purpose: Ambient shadow on primary buttons at rest.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Structural hover elevation on cards, carousel controls, button hover.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default transition for color and opacity changes (300ms).

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Enter transitions for mobile nav and tab content (200ms).

motion.name: lift-hover
motion.purpose: Project card and skill tile hover lift.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA — See My Work, Get in Touch.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">See My Work<svg class="ds-btn-icon" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14"/><path d="m12 5 7 7-7 7"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 48px; padding: 0 32px; background: #1B213B; color: #F5F2E9; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(27, 33, 59, 0.08); transition: background 300ms, box-shadow 300ms, transform 300ms; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #252D4A; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(27, 33, 59, 0.12); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(27, 33, 59, 0.3); } .ds-btn-icon { flex-shrink: 0; transition: transform 300ms; } .ds-btn-primary:hover .ds-btn-icon { transform: translateX(4px); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action — Download CV, See All projects.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-outline"><svg class="ds-btn-icon" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="7 10 12 15 17 10"/><line x1="12" x2="12" y1="15" y2="3"/></svg>Download My CV</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 48px; padding: 0 32px; background: transparent; color: #1B213B; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; border: 2px solid rgba(27, 33, 59, 0.2); border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 300ms; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(27, 33, 59, 0.05); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(27, 33, 59, 0.3); }

components.name: Project Card
components.description: Featured work card with image, title, tags, and hover overlay.
components.html:
Enterprise

Fleet Monitoring Dashboard

Real-time operational dashboard for government fleet tracking.

Vue.jsNuxt.js
components.css: .ds-project-card { background: #FAF8F3; border: 1px solid rgba(27, 33, 59, 0.1); border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; transition: box-shadow 300ms, transform 300ms; } .ds-project-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(27, 33, 59, 0.12); transform: translateY(-4px); } .ds-project-card-image { aspect-ratio: 16/10; background: rgba(27, 33, 59, 0.05); position: relative; } .ds-project-card-badge { position: absolute; top: 12px; right: 12px; padding: 4px 10px; background: #1B213B; color: #F5F2E9; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-project-card-body { padding: 20px; } .ds-project-card-title { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; color: #1B213B; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-project-card-desc { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; color: rgba(27, 33, 59, 0.6); margin: 0; } .ds-project-card-tags { display: flex; gap: 6px; margin-top: 12px; } .ds-tag { font-size: 10px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(27, 33, 59, 0.05); color: rgba(27, 33, 59, 0.6); font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Skill Tile
components.description: Skill grid item with icon well and label.
components.html: Vue.js
components.css: .ds-skill-tile { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; background: #FAF8F3; border: 1px solid rgba(27, 33, 59, 0.1); border-radius: 12px; transition: border-color 300ms, box-shadow 300ms; } .ds-skill-tile:hover { border-color: rgba(27, 33, 59, 0.2); box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(27, 33, 59, 0.08); } .ds-skill-icon { width: 36px; height: 36px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #fff; border: 1px solid rgba(27, 33, 59, 0.05); border-radius: 8px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-skill-label { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #1B213B; }

components.name: Navigation Header
components.description: Sticky header with serif logo, nav links, and CTA.
components.html:
RFS.
AboutExperienceProjects
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 80px; padding: 0 32px; background: rgba(245, 242, 233, 0.9); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(27, 33, 59, 0.05); } .ds-nav-logo { font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: #1B213B; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 32px; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(27, 33, 59, 0.7); text-decoration: none; transition: color 300ms; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #1B213B; } .ds-nav-cta { height: 48px; padding: 0 32px; background: #1B213B; color: #F5F2E9; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(27, 33, 59, 0.08); transition: background 300ms; } .ds-nav-cta:hover { background: #252D4A; }

components.name: Section Headline
components.css: .ds-headline { font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; font-size: clamp(2.25rem, 5vw, 3rem); font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.1; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #1B213B; margin: 0; }

components.name: Experience Tab
components.description: Tab control for Fulltime / Freelance experience toggle.
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: flex; gap: 32px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(27, 33, 59, 0.1); } .ds-tab { padding: 0 4px 12px; background: none; border: none; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(27, 33, 59, 0.5); cursor: pointer; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; transition: color 300ms, border-color 300ms; } .ds-tab:hover { color: #1B213B; } .ds-tab-active { color: #1B213B; border-bottom-color: #1B213B; } .ds-tab-count { font-size: 0.875rem; margin-left: 8px; }

narrative.overview:
This system treats the portfolio as a working draft under desk lamp light: deep indigo ink on warm bone paper, serif headlines with technical precision underneath. Boldness comes from contrast and structure — not spectacle. The site reads like an editorial developer portfolio where every spacing decision and transition proves frontend craft.

The palette rejects warm-neutral AI defaults in naming and intent: bone surfaces carry a cool indigo tint, not generic cream. Motion and hover lift do the work that decorative effects would otherwise attempt. PRODUCT.md's anti-reference holds: no glassmorphism, gradient text, or gratuitous animation.
keyCharacteristics: Deep indigo + warm bone — ink-on-paper authority with cool undertone
Playfair Display display / Inter body — editorial headline, technical body
Structural elevation — flat surfaces at rest; shadow-card on interactive hover
Pill CTAs, 12–16px container corners — technical-precise, not over-rounded
Section rhythm via tonal shifts instead of nested cards

rules.name: The Two-Ink Rule
rules.body: Only indigo and bone (plus opacity steps) appear on any screen. Skill brand colors stay inside icon tiles only — never as UI chrome.

rules.name: The Contrast Rule
rules.body: Body text on bone must hit WCAG 2.1 AAA (7:1). Muted copy at navy/70% is the floor for paragraph text; navy/50% is metadata only.

rules.name: The Display Floor Rule
rules.body: Display letter-spacing never goes below -0.04em. Tighter tracking makes serif letters touch and reads cramped, not designed.

rules.name: The One Kicker Rule
rules.body: At most one uppercase tracked label per page section. Repeated eyebrow kickers on every section is AI grammar — avoid.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No element ships with both a 1px border and a wide soft shadow. Pick one depth signal: border tint OR shadow, never both as decoration.

rules.name: The Motion-Over-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Prefer translateY(-4px) and opacity transitions for feedback. Shadows confirm elevation; motion carries the interaction.

dos: Do use deep indigo on warm bone for all primary UI — the two-ink system is the brand.
Do lead with Playfair Display at display scale for hero and section headlines; Inter for everything else.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest and apply shadow-card only on hover/focus for interactive elements.
Do use motion (translateY, opacity, 300ms ease-out) as the primary interaction feedback.
Do maintain WCAG 2.1 AAA contrast — bump muted text toward ink when in doubt.
Do alternate section backgrounds with tonal shifts for rhythm without nested cards.
donts: Don't ship over-designed, flashy portfolios: heavy gratuitous animation, glassmorphism, gradient text, or decorative effects that obscure the work.
Don't pair border: 1px solid with wide soft shadows on the same element — the ghost-card pattern is prohibited.
Don't use background-clip: text gradient text for emphasis. Solid indigo, weight, or size only.
Don't put uppercase tracked eyebrow labels above every section — one kicker per page maximum.
Don't exceed 16px border-radius on cards and containers. Full pill is for buttons and tags only.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left > 1px colored accent) on cards or list items.
Don't gate content visibility on animation — all content must be visible by default for reduced-motion and SSR.
